text:
"Out of the Dark" is a song from the film Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo. It is track 5 in the album Music from Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo, disc 1. https://vgmdb.net/album/35707 

In the film, the song is featured during Mark 09's assault on the AAA Wunder and its subsequent capture of Shinji Ikari.

Lyrics

 
Out of the dark when the world was nothing
from emptiness he began creation
on the first day where no light had shone
and so lit the sky for the first time ever

after light the heavens opened for us all to have a place where our spirits go
let there be a great expanse of air dividing water from above and below
this was his heaven
the seas did gather
dry land did follow
light in the heavens
the sun and moon and
all living creatures
were then created
to be forever
